name: Bountiful Stuffed Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the squash in half lengthwise; discard seeds and fiber.
2. Place, cut side down, in a microwave-safe baking dish.
3. Cover and microwave on High for 4 minutes.
4. Turn the squash over and rotate the dish. Cover and microwave on High for another 4 minutes,
or until the squash is tender but still firm.
5. Meanwhile, saute onion in hot oil in a large skillet over high heat until translucent.
6. Add turkey and apple; cook and stir over medium heat for 5 minutes, or until the turkey is no longer pink.
7. Sprinkle flour evenly over the meat mixture; stir to blend.
8. Gradually stir in lite soy sauce; cook, stirring, until slightly thickened.
9. Stir in raisins; remove from heat.
10. Fill squash halves equally with turkey mixture.
11. Cover loosely and microwave on High for 1 minute to thoroughly heat the filling.
